description: As the others try to solve the problem, the Ghost Rider entity takes full control of Mack and leaves Zephyr One in pursuit of vengeance. Daisy rushes after Mack on her own. Meanwhile, Coulson and Fitz struggle to alert their friends while Robbie contends with the Ghost Rider leaving his body, realizing it's now inside Mack. The team is thrown further into chaos as Mack's actions take a dangerous turn.
location: Zephyr One (S.H.I.E.L.D. quinjet / mobile command plane)

transcript.line: Cold.
Keep working Nadeer's people.
Yeah. Yeah, it's cold and heartless. I swear, if I get out of here, I'm gonna knock him stupid.
No. I'm cold.
What?
I'm freezing.
What happened?
I don't know. I need sunlight.
Dr. Radcliffe, how are you?
Warmth, anything. I'm dying here.
Okay, okay. Okay, let's get you warm.
May, I need you to hear me. I'm not gone! May, help! Ahh.
You're not allowed to be gone, not yet.
No, I haven't gone anywhere.
You're not dead. After the Glasgow Assignment, we promised that we would open that bottle of Haig if we ever had a worse job. We've had 10 by now.
I think Fury would rather have had us die than give up that bottle.
What the hell are we waiting for?
Hey. I'm here. May, I'm right here. You can do this. Hear me, please. Yes. It's me, May. I'm right here. The Darkhold. No. No, no, no. That's not how we solve this. May. No.
I know you're not okay, but... you okay?
What if Daisy was right and they're not dead?
Mack, do not let her open that book.
Where's this coming from?
I have a feeling, can't explain.
I know you're hurting, but Coulson was clear. Do not open that book.
Thank you. Someone listens.
He didn't know what was inside it.
He knew enough. It's Pandora's Box, and you don't know the consequences.
Really? You're not hearing this?
Neither do you. This might be our only shot at saving them.
Melinda, don't you dare.
What happened?
I don't know. He just doubled over. There's nothing I can do about it.
We're being dragged down. He doesn't want to go. He won't go.
But I wanted him to leave. You know, figure himself out.
No! He won't go!
I didn't know that was what he was up against.
Who won't go?
It's... It's gone.
What do you mean? Where did it go?
He's gonna go straight for Uncle Eli.
And he'd be doing the right thing.
Mack, what are you doing?
Sir, you got to stop. Director's orders. We're about to take off any minute.
Mack, what's gotten into you? Mack!
Did what I think just happened just happen?
He's going after the Chinatown Crew.
Tell May what happened. And if we ever get the chance, never tell your brother about this next part.
Oh, no, we're way past that.
Wait. What are you thinking? Don't go.
If I'm being dragged down to hell, this might be my chance to take Eli with me. Sorry, Coulson.
What's going on?
Oh, nothing. Just Mack's the Ghost Rider now, but you can't hear us, so... bloody hell.
Pull over! What are you doing?!
What needs to be done! Don't get in my way!
Damn it, Mack.
It heals itself. Scientifically impossible self-healing car.
This isn't over.
They're out of their minds. They are out of their minds. Driving off against orders... With no helmet? Mack knows better.
Daisy will bring him in quietly.
See the younger Reyes boy gets some counseling.
